references.text: Maideen, H, YAM Arbawi, NM Khaduwi & NNN Mohd Kamil. 2018. A systematic study on the genus Cibotium Kaulf. of Peninsular Malaysia. Malaysian Applied Biology 47: 79-84.

genera.last_edited: Last edited by Heidi Newton & Pieter B. Pelser, 24 September 2024

species.citation: (L.) J.Sm. , London J. Bot. 1 (1842) 437 ; Praptosuwiryo et al., Biodiversitas 12 (2011) 204; ≡ Polypodium barometz L. , Sp. Pl., 1st Ed. (1753) 1092.
species.distribution: India to China, Malesia. LUZON: Ifugao, Laguna, Mountain Province, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte.

Borneo, Malay Peninsula, Philippines. LUZON: Bataan, Benguet, Camarines, Camarines Norte, Ifugao, Ilocos Sur, Laguna, Mountain Province, Pampanga, Quezon, Zambales, MINDANAO: Agusan del Norte, MINDORO.
